texto: I want to go swimming," the child said. She waited for opposition, but none came. So she took off her clothes, slowly and nervously. She glanced at her grandmother -- you can't depend on people who just let things happen. She put her legs in the water."It's cold," she said."Of course it's cold," the old woman said, her thoughts somewhere else. "What did you expect?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jansson que provoca temas ligados a familia. Ao questionar “I want to go swimming," the child said. She waited for opposition, but none came. So she took off…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, children, grandmothers, com foco em termino e grandmothers.
